chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4941 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ أَبِي خَدِيجَةَ سَالِمِ بْنِ مُكْرَمٍ اَلْجَمَّالِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "اَلْكَذِبُ عَلَى اَللَّهِ وَ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ وَ عَلَى اَلْأَوْصِيَاءِ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ مِنَ اَلْكَبَائِرِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4941 - In the narration of Abu Khadijah Salim ibn Mukarram al-Jammal from Abu Abdillah (as), he said:
"Lying against Allah (swt), His Messenger (sw), and the successors (as) (peace be upon them) is among the major sins."
